title: Identify Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander culturally significant plants
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander culturally significant plants demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for plant recognition

pcs.text: Recognise range of plants and plant species according to predetermined criteria, and job or client needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise range of plants and plant species according to predetermined criteria, and job or client needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise range of plants and plant species according to predetermined criteria, and job or client needs.

pcs.text: Work in partnership with local Community and organisations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work in partnership with local Community and organisations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work in partnership with local Community and organisations.

pcs.text: Identify and locate resources required for use in recognition activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and locate resources required for use in recognition activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and locate resources required for use in recognition activity.

pcs.text: Research potential for rare and endangered plant species in survey area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research potential for rare and endangered plant species in survey area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research potential for rare and endangered plant species in survey area.

pcs.text: Implement processes for plant recognition, including consultation and seeking approval from relevant local Cultural Authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement processes for plant recognition, including consultation and seeking approval from relevant local Cultural Authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement processes for plant recognition, including consultation and seeking approval from relevant local Cultural Authorities.

pcs.text: Investigate and document Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) principles in relation to local knowledge and cultural protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and document Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) principles in relation to local knowledge and cultural protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and document Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) principles in relation to local knowledge and cultural protocols.

pcs.text: Identify safety hazards and apply work health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify safety hazards and apply work health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify safety hazards and apply work health and safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for plant recognition

elements.title: Identify specified culturally significant plants

pcs.text: Name specified plants according to their identifiable characteristics and by their local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander name
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Name specified plants according to their identifiable characteristics and by their local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander name?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Name specified plants according to their identifiable characteristics and by their local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander name.

pcs.text: Determine and record plant habits, characteristics and significant features according to organisational requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and record plant habits, characteristics and significant features according to organisational requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and record plant habits, characteristics and significant features according to organisational requirements.

pcs.text: Seek advice from Cultural Authorities or supervisors when necessary and where appropriate in the recognition activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice from Cultural Authorities or supervisors when necessary and where appropriate in the recognition activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice from Cultural Authorities or supervisors when necessary and where appropriate in the recognition activity.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify specified culturally significant plants

elements.title: Survey and record identification of culturally significant plants in a specified area

pcs.text: Survey site and record location of plants using maps and grid references
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Survey site and record location of plants using maps and grid references?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Survey site and record location of plants using maps and grid references.

pcs.text: Record cultural uses and significance of specified plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record cultural uses and significance of specified plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record cultural uses and significance of specified plants.

pcs.text: Document information about plants, and add to reference collection according to organisational requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document information about plants, and add to reference collection according to organisational requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document information about plants, and add to reference collection according to organisational requirements.

pcs.text: Update reference collection if new plants are recognised
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Update reference collection if new plants are recognised?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update reference collection if new plants are recognised.

pcs.text: Record rare or endangered plant species in location if present
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record rare or endangered plant species in location if present?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record rare or endangered plant species in location if present.

pcs.text: Utilise appropriate disposal techniques for plant debris if specimen collection is necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Utilise appropriate disposal techniques for plant debris if specimen collection is necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Utilise appropriate disposal techniques for plant debris if specimen collection is necessary.

pcs.text: Apply environmentally sustainable practices for carrying out observation activities to minimise degradation and disturbance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply environmentally sustainable practices for carrying out observation activities to minimise degradation and disturbance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply environmentally sustainable practices for carrying out observation activities to minimise degradation and disturbance.

pcs.text: Record areas requiring restoration and re-establishment of culturally significant plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record areas requiring restoration and re-establishment of culturally significant plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record areas requiring restoration and re-establishment of culturally significant plants.

pcs.text: Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures for carrying out survey activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures for carrying out survey activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace health and safety policies and procedures for carrying out survey activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Survey and record identification of culturally significant plants in a specified area

elements.title: Identify local bushland and/or bush foods and their uses

pcs.text: Record the relationship between local foods, physical wellbeing and the land in Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander culture
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the relationship between local foods, physical wellbeing and the land in Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander culture?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the relationship between local foods, physical wellbeing and the land in Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander culture.

pcs.text: Locate and gather information from a range of sources about access to bush foods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and gather information from a range of sources about access to bush foods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and gather information from a range of sources about access to bush foods.

pcs.text: Identify and record local plants using their common, scientific and cultural names
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record local plants using their common, scientific and cultural names?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record local plants using their common, scientific and cultural names.

pcs.text: Identify and record cultural uses of available bush resources for food and medicine
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record cultural uses of available bush resources for food and medicine?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record cultural uses of available bush resources for food and medicine.

pcs.text: Identify and record land management practices with respect to conservation of species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record land management practices with respect to conservation of species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record land management practices with respect to conservation of species.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Identify local bushland and/or bush foods and their uses

elements.title: Identify and report potential threats to culturally significant plants and implement and monitor strategies for restoration

pcs.text: Identify and record invasive flora and fauna species if present in survey area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record invasive flora and fauna species if present in survey area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record invasive flora and fauna species if present in survey area.

pcs.text: Report location of invasive flora and fauna species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report location of invasive flora and fauna species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report location of invasive flora and fauna species.

pcs.text: Develop strategies in partnership with local Community and organisations to support restoration and re-establishment of culturally significant plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop strategies in partnership with local Community and organisations to support restoration and re-establishment of culturally significant plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop strategies in partnership with local Community and organisations to support restoration and re-establishment of culturally significant plants.

pcs.text: Assist in the implementation of restoration and re-establishment strategies with local Community and organisations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist in the implementation of restoration and re-establishment strategies with local Community and organisations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist in the implementation of restoration and re-establishment strategies with local Community and organisations.

pcs.text: Work in partnership with local Community and organisations to monitor and evaluate strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work in partnership with local Community and organisations to monitor and evaluate strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work in partnership with local Community and organisations to monitor and evaluate strategies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Identify and report potential threats to culturally significant plants and implement and monitor strategies for restoration

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
